---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles/home.css
---

::: {.home-shell}

# Modelos Lineares Generalizados

Pagina dedicada a demonstação de habilidades na resolução dos desafios da matéria de Elementos de Machine Learning da Especialização em Estatística Aplicada (Data Science) da UFMG.


::: {.content-grid}
::: {.section-block}
## Integrantes

::: {.members-grid}
::: {.member-card}
<img class="member-photo" src="img/joao_victor_icon.png" alt="Foto de João Victor">

### João Victor

<p class="member-role">Data Analyst | Data Scientist | Machine Learning | SQL</p>

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://github.com/joaovictor-datascience){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/joaovictor-datascience/){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="member-photo" src="img/lucas_tavares_icon.jpeg" alt="Foto de Lucas Tavares">

### Lucas Tavares

<p class="member-role">Economista | CP³P | Consultor</p>

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://github.com/lucastbrito){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucastbrito){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="member-photo" src="img/lucas_reges_icon.png" alt="Foto de Lucas Reges">

### Lucas Reges

<p class="member-role">Data Science | Applied Statistics | SQL | Python | R</p>

::: {.social-links}
[<i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://github.com/zf0rest){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucasregeslima/){.social-link target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Desafios

::: {.challenge-list}
::: {.challenge-item}
**Desafio 01**

[Acessar desafio](desafios/Desafio1_Elementos_De_Aprendizado_De_Maquina.html)
:::

::: {.challenge-item}
**Desafio 02**

[Em breve]{.coming-soon}
:::

::: {.challenge-item}
**Desafio 03**

[Em breve]{.coming-soon}
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::
